items.caption: A fortune teller looking at Donald Duck. Text: "LOOOK! LOOOK! DON'T BLINK! .... HA! I SEE YOU HAF REPRESSED DESIRE! THERE EES SOMETHING YOU WANT!"
items.md: ![A fortune teller looking at Donald Duck. Text: "LOOOK! LOOOK! DON'T BLINK! .... HA! I SEE YOU HAF REPRESSED DESIRE! THERE EES SOMETHING YOU WANT!"](CBatAotCB-102_page_1_image_2_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Close up of the fortune teller's face. Text: "LOOOK DEEP EENTO MY EYES, SO I CAN SEE WHAT EES THEES THING YOU WANT!"
items.md: ![Close up of the fortune teller's face. Text: "LOOOK DEEP EENTO MY EYES, SO I CAN SEE WHAT EES THEES THING YOU WANT!"](CBatAotCB-102_page_1_image_4_v2.jpg)

items.caption: The fortune teller slams her hands on the table, startling Donald. Text: "BAM!"
items.md: ![The fortune teller slams her hands on the table, startling Donald. Text: "BAM!"](CBatAotCB-102_page_1_image_3_v2.jpg)

items.caption: The fortune teller chasing Donald out of her house. Text: "YOU MONSTAIR! YOU FIEND! GEET OUT FROM MY HOUSE! I AM EENSULT!"
items.md: ![The fortune teller chasing Donald out of her house. Text: "YOU MONSTAIR! YOU FIEND! GEET OUT FROM MY HOUSE! I AM EENSULT!"](CBatAotCB-102_page_1_image_5_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald Duck in a coat and hat running away. Text: "MADAME! MADAME! CALM YOURSELF!"
items.md: ![Donald Duck in a coat and hat running away. Text: "MADAME! MADAME! CALM YOURSELF!"](CBatAotCB-102_page_1_image_7_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald talking to the fortune teller who is sitting in a chair. Text: "DID YOU READ HIS MIND? DID YOU FIND OUT WHAT HE WANTED?" "I'LL SAY I DEED!"
items.md: ![Donald talking to the fortune teller who is sitting in a chair. Text: "DID YOU READ HIS MIND? DID YOU FIND OUT WHAT HE WANTED?" "I'LL SAY I DEED!"](CBatAotCB-102_page_1_image_9_v2.jpg)

items.caption: The fortune teller yelling at Donald. Text: "THAT EENSULTING MONSTAIR WANTED MY PEECTURE TO FRIGHTEN HEES NEPHEWS WEEETH!"
items.md: ![The fortune teller yelling at Donald. Text: "THAT EENSULTING MONSTAIR WANTED MY PEECTURE TO FRIGHTEN HEES NEPHEWS WEEETH!"](CBatAotCB-102_page_1_image_6_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald driving a car in the snow with the fortune teller. Text: "HUH?" "I SAID, TAKE ME RIGHT HOME!"
items.md: ![Donald driving a car in the snow with the fortune teller. Text: "HUH?" "I SAID, TAKE ME RIGHT HOME!"](CBatAotCB-102_page_1_image_8_v2.jpg)
From "You Can't Guess!" in *Christmas Parade* No. 2, 1950; © 1950 Walt Disney Productions.
